title: Air AdCreate
description: Adds realistic oxygen mechanics for high altitudes, the Nether, and the End with Ad Astra integration
body:
🚀 Air AdCreate
Air AdCreate is a hardcore survival expansion for Minecraft 1.20.1 that turns altitude and hostile dimensions into a true test for your lungs. In this world, air is no longer free—it’s a resource you must manage to survive.

🌌 Lethal Environments
Without proper life support, you will begin to suffocate in the following conditions:
Altitude & Depths: Above 250 or below -15 blocks.
Hostile Dimensions: Total vacuum in The End and toxic atmosphere in the Nether.

⚙️ Life Support Systems (Create + Ad Astra)
The mod bridges the technologies of two industrial giants to keep you alive:
Create Integration: Use the Copper Backtank and Diving Helmet. Equipping them triggers an adaptive HUD that displays precise air pressure percentages. The interface automatically shifts its design to match your gear (Copper or Netherite).
Ad Astra Integration: Use full Space Suits (4/4 pieces). The mod directly monitors oxygen levels from your Ad Astra internal tanks for a seamless survival experience.

⚖️ Survival Balance
Air depletion speed scales with the severity of the environment:
Overworld: Standard consumption rate for high-altitude engineering.
The Nether: Increased consumption due to extreme heat and gases.
The End: Critical depletion rates designed for the absolute vacuum of space.

🛠 Requirements
Minecraft Forge (1.20.1, Rec. 47.4.10)
Ad Astra 1.15.20
Create 6.0.8

Links:
